name: Highlight Reel
description: TV segment narrative outcomes affecting Grudge and TV Grades

entries.templateText: The arena lights drop to pitch black and {WRESTLER_1} makes a shocking, unannounced return from injury, sending the crowd into an absolute frenzy.
{WRESTLER_1} bursts through the crowd during a standard match, marking an explosive return from suspension to clear the ring.
An iconic theme song echoes out of the PA system as {WRESTLER_1} steps onto the stage after months away, shocking the wrestling world.
{WRESTLER_1} hits the ring disguised as a camera operator, pulling off their mask to reveal their return by blindsiding {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} stands on the entrance ramp, pointing directly at the championship banner to declare their long-awaited return to active competition.
{WRESTLER_1} returns during an interview segment, silently walking down the ramp to lock eyes with an incredibly stunned {WRESTLER_2}.
The countdown clock expires and {WRESTLER_1} makes an unadvertised return, completely changing the landscape of the main event picture.
{WRESTLER_1} makes a dramatic return via the arena rafters, dropping down to rescue {WRESTLER_2} from an overwhelming numbers game.
A sleek vignette concludes with {WRESTLER_1} stepping through the curtain, marking a high-profile, incredibly hyped roster debut.
{WRESTLER_1} makes an unannounced debut from the developmental brand, instantly laying out {WRESTLER_2} with a thunderous signature strike.
The international standout {WRESTLER_1} debuts by walking right down to ringside and staring intensely at the reigning champion.
{WRESTLER_1} debuts by hijacking the microphone during a commercial break, cutting an incredibly sharp promo that introduces their persona.
A mysterious, highly stylized entrance video plays as {WRESTLER_1} makes an ominous main roster debut that leaves the arena completely silent.
{WRESTLER_1} makes a surprise debut by interrupting a standard squash match, annihilating both competitors to make an immediate statement.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} sit across from each other, calmly signing the contract for their upcoming championship match before shaking hands.
The contract signing quickly breaks down; {WRESTLER_1} hoists {WRESTLER_2} up and drives them directly through the mahogany table.
{WRESTLER_1} signs the contract with their own blood, presenting a terrifying visual display of psychological warfare to {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} signs the document, but {WRESTLER_1} flips the heavy table directly onto them, initiating a chaotic, wild ringside brawl.
{WRESTLER_1} refuses to sign the contract, ripping the paperwork to shreds right in front of an incredibly frustrated {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} locks {WRESTLER_2} inside a submission hold right on top of the unsigned contract, forcing an executive official to intervene.
An executive official presents {WRESTLER_1} with a brand-new, customized championship belt during a lavish, pyro-heavy ring ceremony.
{WRESTLER_1} is celebrating their new title when {WRESTLER_2} drops from the ceiling, snatching the gold away before sprinting into the crowd.
{WRESTLER_1} hosts a massive title presentation filled with balloons and champagne, completely mocking the hard work of {WRESTLER_2}.
During a championship presentation, {WRESTLER_2} walks out and uses a spray can to deface the new title belt held by {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} hits a brutal low blow on the legend presenting the championship belt, drawing intense, deafening heat from the live arena.
{WRESTLER_1} stops their own title ceremony to call out {WRESTLER_2}, demanding they look directly at the gold they will never win.
{WRESTLER_1} approaches the guardrail, taking off their signature sunglasses and handing them directly to a crying child in the front row.
{WRESTLER_1} slaps a cup of soda out of a fan's hand, actively berating the ringside crowd until arena security forces them back.
{WRESTLER_1} celebrates a massive victory by jumping deep into the crowd, surfing the wave of ecstatic fans at ringside.
{WRESTLER_1} gets right into the face of a vocal fan, using their microphone to completely humiliate them on live international television.
{WRESTLER_1} pulls an enthusiastic fan over the guardrail to dance in the ring, creating a highly memorable, feel-good television moment.
{WRESTLER_1} uses an innocent fan as a human shield to successfully dodge a flying crossbody attempt from a desperate {WRESTLER_2}.
The TitanTron screen flashes to a dark, hidden camera feed showing {WRESTLER_1} systematically destroying the locker room of {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} cuts a live video promo from a remote hospital bed, vowing absolute, unmitigated vengeance against a smirking {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} plays exclusive, highly embarrassing archival training footage on the big screen to completely ruin the segment of {WRESTLER_2}.
The big screen reveals a shocking live parking lot feed showing {WRESTLER_1} getting jumped by a masked group of rogue individuals.
{WRESTLER_1} hacks the arena broadcast signal, playing an ominous video message that counts down the exact days left in the career of {WRESTLER_2}.
A mysterious satellite broadcast interrupts the show, revealing that {WRESTLER_1} has been secretly communicating with a rival promotion's management.
{WRESTLER_1} storms down to the ring in civilian clothes, grabs a microphone, and issues an open, impromptu challenge to anyone in the back.
{WRESTLER_1} challenges {WRESTLER_2} to a match right this second, catching {WRESTLER_2} completely off-guard as referees rush to start the bout.
{WRESTLER_2} answers an open challenge from {WRESTLER_1}, charging down the ramp to start an incredibly fast-paced, unscheduled television match.
{WRESTLER_1} lays out an impromptu challenge, but aggressively attacks {WRESTLER_2} during their entrance before the bell can officially ring.
{WRESTLER_1} issues an impromptu challenge, then immediately chickens out and leaves the arena the moment {WRESTLER_2} steps onto the stage.
A mainstream Hollywood action movie star sits front row, standing up to cheer loudly as {WRESTLER_1} executes their signature pose.
{WRESTLER_1} gets physical with a guest celebrity musician at ringside, causing a massive mainstream media moment as security separates them.
A champion professional athlete from the local city team steps over the guardrail to hand a weapon directly to {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} insults a guest celebrity chef sitting at ringside, getting a face full of food in a highly embarrassing televised botch.
{WRESTLER_1} manages to convince a guest celebrity influencer to join their faction, creating an incredibly polarizing pop-culture alliance.
The live crowd begins a deafening, unified chant that completely drowns out the scripted, corporate promo being delivered by {WRESTLER_1}.
The arena audience initiates a massive, synchronized crowd wave, completely ignoring a highly flat, unengaging segment featuring {WRESTLER_1}.
An organic, stadium-wide chant for {WRESTLER_2} forces {WRESTLER_1} to break character and visually lose their temper in the center of the ring.
The crowd violently boos a forced corporate announcement by {WRESTLER_1}, completely hijacking the television segment with intense hostility.
A bizarre, funny crowd chant goes highly viral online, instantly turning a standard mid-card promo by {WRESTLER_1} into a memorable segment.
The arena lights totally fail during a promo, and the crowd uses their cell phone flashlights to create a breathtaking visual spectacle for {WRESTLER_1}.
A massive backstage brawl between multiple factions spills right into the arena, completely disrupting the ongoing interview of {WRESTLER_1}.
The stable representing {WRESTLER_1} completely cuts off the power grid to the arena, executing a brutal, pitch-black ambush on {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} has their promo completely disrupted by a shower of red liquid pouring down from the arena ceiling, destroying their expensive suit.
An invading stable from a rival wrestling company jumps the barricade, completely ruining the high-profile segment of {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} sees their in-ring celebration completely ruined when a rogue truck crashes directly into the staging area backstage.
{WRESTLER_1} goes on a highly emotional, unscripted rant against management, dropping the microphone and walking out as the segment ends early.
{WRESTLER_1} presents a spectacular, highly coordinated fireworks display to open the broadcast, instantly setting an energetic tone for the night.
{WRESTLER_1} is brutally attacked by a masked assailant during a routine commercial break, leaving them bleeding heavily on the entrance ramp.
{WRESTLER_1} brings out a legendary Hall of Famer to announce them as their new official manager, creating an iconic television image.
{WRESTLER_1} stumbles over their lines badly during an intense promo, leading to a loud, embarrassing 'You botched it!' chant from the arena.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the local sports team of the host city, causing an immediate, incredibly hostile wave of uniform boos.
{WRESTLER_1} cuts a deeply moving, completely genuine promo about their real-life recovery journey, gaining massive universal respect.
{WRESTLER_1} acts incredibly arrogant, throwing their official merchandise directly into a nearby ringside trash can while laughing.
{WRESTLER_2} uses a massive steel pipe to smash up the luxury sports car belonging to {WRESTLER_1} live in the arena parking lot.
{WRESTLER_1} enters the arena riding a massive, high-powered military vehicle, generating a truly unforgettable visual entrance.
An intense, multi-man locker room brawl requires the active intervention of the entire local police force to separate {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} stands victoriously on top of a 15-foot ladder center ring, holding a briefcase high as pyro explodes directly behind them.
{WRESTLER_1} completely refuses to compete in their scheduled match, walking out of the building to a cascade of heavy arena boos.
{WRESTLER_1} completely saves a failing, low-energy segment by executing a spectacular, unscripted dive off the top of the video screen.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the elderly, beloved broadcast commentator at ringside, flipping their desk over in a disgusting display of power.
{WRESTLER_2} introduces a highly popular, returning gimmick persona from their past, blowing the roof completely off the live stadium.
{WRESTLER_1} gets trapped inside a descending steel cage while a vengeful {WRESTLER_2} slowly walks down the ramp carrying a heavy weapon.
{WRESTLER_1} throws an incredible, massive celebration party featuring live musical performers, completely elevating the production level of the show.
{WRESTLER_1} hits a brutal running dropkick that sends {WRESTLER_2} crashing directly through the thick plastic protective ringside barricade.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers a highly memorable, legendary comedic insult that instantly trends worldwide, completely ruining the serious persona of {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} stands completely alone in the center of a dark ring as a single spotlight focuses on them, cementing their status as the face of the brand.
